resources.string: Numbers on this list will be silenced when they call — the call still appears on screen so you can answer or decline it.
Tap the + button below to add a phone number you want to silence.
Enter a phone number to silence it. When this number calls, the phone will show the incoming call on screen but play no sound or ringtone.
Please enter a valid phone number
This number is already in the silent list
Active — silenced numbers will not ring
Disabled — all calls will ring normally
When disabled, all calls ring normally even if the number is on your silent list. Your list is preserved and the feature can be re-enabled at any time.
Remove %1$s from the silent list? This number will ring normally again.

Silent Caller needs the following permissions to work:

• Read Phone State — to detect incoming calls
• Read Call Log — to identify the caller's number
• Modify Audio Settings — to silence the ringer

Without these permissions, the app cannot silence calls.
Silent Caller cannot function without the required permissions. Please open Settings and grant the permissions manually to enable call silencing.

Silent Caller can show a mute icon over the incoming call screen so you can add any caller to your silent list with one tap.\n\nTo enable this, tap "Open Settings" and turn on "Display over other apps" for Silent Caller.
Add this number to your permanent silent list?
Future calls from this number will be permanently silent.
This number is already in your silent list
